# MDE v1.4.5

## Features

- Collapsed the editor top-right action bar when more than five actions are available.
- The collapsed editor action bar now keeps Search, AI Translate, AI Summary, and Version History visible by priority, with an arrow button to reveal the full action set.
- Expanded editor actions now expose line spacing and editor width controls without marking the width toggle as a pressed state.

## Bug Fixes

- Aligned the collapsed YAML frontmatter summary text with the Markdown editor body text while keeping the chevron in the left gutter.

## Breaking Changes

- None.

## Maintenance

- Split the AI summary and translation action buttons into reusable renderer components so the editor action bar can prioritize them independently.
- Added unit coverage for editor action overflow ordering and expanded/collapsed behavior.
- Added integration coverage for the frontmatter collapsed summary alignment CSS.
- Updated E2E coverage for frontmatter text alignment, editor action overflow, and existing editor controls hidden behind the overflow button.

## Documentation and User Manual

- Updated the zh-CN editor manual to explain that extra editor actions are available through the action bar arrow when more than five actions are present.

## Verification

- `npm run lint`
- `npm run typecheck`
- `npm run test:unit`
- `npm run test:integration`
- `npm run test:e2e`
- `npm run docs:build`
- `npm run build`
- `npm audit --audit-level=high`

## Artifacts

- GitHub Actions should publish the macOS DMG/ZIP artifacts and Windows NSIS installer artifacts for `v1.4.5`.
- Repository signing/notarization secrets are optional for the no-paid-account release path; release signing behavior will follow the repository's configured secrets.
